title: senecio schultesii
intro: Senecio schultesii, also known as the Mexican fireweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio schultesii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Senecio schultesii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically to soothe skin irritations.
